title: ERC-20 Transfer History
description: Fetch the full ERC-20 transfer history for any wallet address — every token sent and received, with USD values, block timestamps, and decoded token metadata across all EVM chains.
useCase: Build a complete token transfer timeline showing every ERC-20 sent and received with USD amounts — perfect for tax reporting tools and portfolio trackers.

keyParams.chainName: EVM chain identifier (e.g. eth-mainnet, base-mainnet, matic-mainnet)
keyParams.contractAddress: Optional ERC-20 contract address to filter transfers for a specific token
